💾 Cloud Sync

Auto-Sync to Google Drive

Warning: Switching this off means data will not be backed up to Drive.

⏱️ Auto-Backups

Automatically saves a snapshot every 10 mins.

⚠️ Danger Zone

Completely wipe all local and cloud data.
